questions.question: How does Kirchenbauer-style (SynthID-text) token watermarking embed a signal?
options: By modifying the prompt template
By encrypting the output with a public key
At each decoding step, hash the previous K tokens to partition the vocabulary into green/red sets and bias sampling toward green; detection counts green tokens via a z-score
By inserting a hidden HTML comment
questions.question_zh: Kirchenbauer 风格的（SynthID-text）token watermarking 是如何嵌入信号的？
options_zh: 通过修改 prompt 模板
用公钥对输出加密
在每一步解码时，用前 K 个 token 的 hash 把词表分成绿/红两组，并把采样偏向绿色集合；检测时通过 z-score 统计绿色 token 的数量
插入隐藏的 HTML 注释

questions.question: What is the primary limitation of text watermarks against paraphrase?
options: Rewording or paraphrasing the text destroys the green-token statistical signal
Paraphrase only affects image watermarks
Paraphrase strengthens the watermark
They actually survive paraphrase
questions.question_zh: 文本水印面对 paraphrase 时最主要的局限是什么？
options_zh: 改写或同义改写会破坏绿色 token 的统计信号
paraphrase 只影响图像水印
paraphrase 会增强水印
实际上水印能挺过 paraphrase

questions.question: What does Stable Signature (Fernandez et al., ICCV 2023) do?
options: Uses C2PA to sign the image at upload
Adds a visible watermark in the corner of the image
Fine-tunes the latent diffusion decoder so every generated image carries a fixed embedded message detectable from the latent
Signs the metadata with a private key
questions.question_zh: Stable Signature（Fernandez et al., ICCV 2023）做了什么？
options_zh: 在上传时用 C2PA 给图片签名
在图像角落添加可见水印
对 latent diffusion 的 decoder 做微调，使每张生成图都带有可从 latent 中检测出的固定嵌入信息
用私钥对 metadata 进行签名

questions.question: What does the May 2024 'Stable Signature is Unstable' result demonstrate?
options: The watermark is provably unforgeable
The watermark requires C2PA to function
The watermark fails only on JPEG compression
Post-generation fine-tuning of the decoder can remove the watermark while preserving image quality, undermining adversarial robustness
questions.question_zh: 2024 年 5 月的 “Stable Signature is Unstable” 结果证明了什么？
options_zh: 水印在可证明意义上不可伪造
水印需要 C2PA 才能工作
水印只在 JPEG 压缩时失效
在生成之后再对 decoder 进行微调，可以在保持图像质量的同时去除水印，破坏其对抗鲁棒性

questions.question: How are C2PA metadata and watermarking complementary?
options: They are interchangeable
Watermarks are signed by the same keys as C2PA
Metadata can be stripped but carries rich provenance chain; watermarks persist through transcoding but carry few bits; layered, they provide a usable provenance story
C2PA replaces watermarks entirely
questions.question_zh: C2PA metadata 与 watermarking 是如何互补的？
options_zh: 两者可互换
watermark 由与 C2PA 相同的密钥签名
metadata 可被剥离但能携带丰富的来源链；watermark 在转码后仍能保留但只能携带很少的比特；两者叠加才能形成可用的 provenance 故事
C2PA 完全替代 watermark

questions.question: Why is 'no SynthID signal' NOT proof of authenticity (human origin)?
options: Because SynthID only watermarks generations from SynthID-enabled models; content from any model without SynthID is unwatermarked by default
Because SynthID is closed-source
Because SynthID always produces false positives on human text
Because SynthID only works on Gemini outputs
questions.question_zh: 为什么 “没有 SynthID 信号” 不能作为 “内容由人类创作” 的证明？
options_zh: 因为 SynthID 只对启用了 SynthID 的模型生成的内容打水印；任何未启用 SynthID 的模型产出的内容默认就是无水印的
因为 SynthID 是闭源的
因为 SynthID 在人类文本上总会产生 false positive
因为 SynthID 只对 Gemini 的输出有效
